title: cymbidium × albanense
intro: Cymbidium × albanense is a hybrid orchid species derived from the cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium lancifolium. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium × albanense include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are believed to have medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm their effectiveness.
